headline: Lateral Flow Assay Market: 2026 Research Report - AI and Digital Technology Integration to Propel Lateral Flow Assay Market Expansion - Forecast to 2030
summary: The global lateral flow assay (LFA) market is projected to grow from USD 10.01 billion in 2024 to USD 15.42 billion by 2030, driven by increasing demand for point-of-care testing and the rising prevalence of infectious diseases. The LFA market encompasses the development, manufacturing, and distribution of test kits and related products across healthcare, pharmaceuticals, food safety, and more. headline: Timothy P. Walbert Joins Patient Square Capital as a Senior Advisor
summary: MENLO PARK, Calif., May 06, 2026--Patient Square Capital, a leading health care investment firm, today announced that Timothy P. Walbert has joined the firm as a Senior Advisor.
